game_name: Super Street Fighter II: The New Challengers

sub_pixel_system.notes: Fighting game on SNES; sub-pixel precision not documented in sources

special_mechanics.name: Combo System
special_mechanics.description: New scoring system implemented tracking number of hits during combos, first attacks, reversals, and recoveries with bonus points awarded

special_mechanics.name: Character-Specific Techniques
special_mechanics.description: Individual characters have refined special techniques including Ryu's Fire Hadōken, Ken's flaming Shoryuken, Zangief's Atomic Buster, and M. Bison's Devil Reverse

special_mechanics.name: Game Speed
special_mechanics.description: Faster game speed from Hyper Fighting was reduced to Champion Edition level for this version

tier_notes: Tier 1 data sourced from TCRF and Wikipedia. No quantitative physics values (velocity, acceleration, gravity, sub-pixel data) are documented in available sources. This is a fighting game where character movement mechanics are frame-data and input-based rather than continuous physics simulation. Specific numerical movement parameters would require ROM analysis or technical documentation not present in these sources.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Super Street Fighter II (SNES)
